pure-black.$description: Pure Black — Primary text, logo wordmark, filled pill buttons, hairline borders — the structural ink that holds every element together

canvas-white.$description: Canvas White — Page background, card surfaces, button text on dark fills — the paper everything sits on

charcoal-slate.$description: Charcoal Slate — Secondary text, link color, body copy, subtle borders — slightly softened black for hierarchy below the primary text level

pale-stone.$description: Pale Stone — Ghost button and segmented toggle background — the only non-white surface, used for inactive controls like the Grid/List switcher

mid-gray.$description: Mid Gray — Muted helper text, low-emphasis borders, disabled states

silver.$description: Silver — Lightest border tone, placeholder outlines, decorative strokes

sans-serif.$description: sans-serif — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

megazoid.$description: Monumental display wordmark for the site title and any project-level hero headings. Ultra-heavy geometric letterforms at near-zero line-height, used sparingly as a single full-bleed statement that bleeds past container edges. The Fill variant is used for filled/knockout versions of the same glyphs.

itc-garamond-std-light-condensed.$description: Editorial serif for reflective about/bio paragraphs and any long-form copy that needs a literary voice. The Light Condensed cut is deliberately anti-corporate — it reads as a thoughtful side note against the massive Megazoid masthead, not as marketing prose.

neue-haas-unica-pro.$description: Primary UI and body typeface — the workhorse for navigation labels, project metadata, links, and inline annotations. Set extremely tight at -0.02em letter-spacing and 1.1 line-height, giving labels a compact, Swiss-catalog density.

megazoid-regular.$description: Megazoid Regular — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

canvas.$description: Surface level 1: Default page background, the dominant visual field

stone-fill.$description: Surface level 2: Ghost controls and inactive toggle segments

ink-surface.$description: Surface level 3: Filled pill buttons and the inverted logo zone
